posts.author: Jen_Conturae (Jen Timothy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

We’re a small startup Tech Business based in the UK (Devon) specialising in Content/AI.

We have a team of 6 looking for some 1-2-1 training sessions either virtually or in person to cover the tagged subjects.

We have set up our workspace, boards etc. and all is working well so far however we would like a better insight into how we can make the best use of the software with the view to setting up our Sales CRM as soon as possible.

Any help or recommendations would be very much appreciated.

Many thanks

posts.author: Ricky.Tomer (Ricky Tomer)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there @Jen_Conturae and thanks for reaching out to the monday.com community forums! There are a ton of awesome partners out there and I’d love to introduce you to CarbonWeb.

We are monday.com Channel Partners and we specialize in custom solution development and stand-alone Suites within the monday.com marketplace. We offer a Consultation Package that will provide you exactly what you’re looking for!

I’d be happy to get some time together to discuss this service, as well as all the ways we help users every day. If you’d like to grab a time to discuss please do so here: Consultation - Ricky

Good luck as you set up your environment!

Best regards,

Ricky Tomer

VP of Sales
Carbon Web Print, LLC
Schedule Consultation | Website
Phone: 440-462-7743 | Email : ricky@carbonweb.co

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jen_Conturae, welcome to the community!

This is certainly something we can assist with and can procure a custom consulting package specific to your requirements.

A little about us, we are a certified monday.com implementation partner and have been helping customers in a variety of industries get up and running and also optimize their current solutions. Everything we do is monday! We are also skilled in external integration programs such as make.com to get the most out of your monday solution but also integrate seamlessly with all your other apps. Each of our Llamas are skilled in Development, Analysis, Project Management and Training.

We like to start with a complementary discovery session to go through your requirements, but also to ensure we are the best possible fit. If you would like to continue you can book your preferred time here: Book A Discovery Session - Green Llamas Consulting. If you can’t find a time that works for you feel free to let us know and we will do our very best to accommodate you personally.

Thanks @Jen_Conturae, looking forward to hearing from you.
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: aquibk (Aquib Zafar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jen_Conturae ,

I am a certified monday.com consultant also specialised in providing the training of monday.com and explaining the entire in and out of the platform.

There are two packages I have for you basic and advance, depending on your requirements and usage you can opt either of them.

For more queries, You can reach out to me at aquibcs @outloook.com.

Best Regards,
Aquib Zafar

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Jen_Conturae ,

Welcome to the monday community!

I am sure our team at thespelas.com can help you out. At thespelas.com we’re an Official and Authorized monday partner with over 5 years of individual experience on the platform and extensive experience in designing and implementing CRM solutions that are tailored to each business’ goals.

Our team of experts can help you optimize your workflow and help you set up your CRM according to business best practices.

We also have a wealth of experience in delivering customized trainings to our clients, concerning both solution and monday use trainings. Our goal is to help our clients use their solution optimally and also give them the insight and knowledge to implement further features on their own.

Please do schedule a Free Consulting Session with us here so we can better discuss your vision and requirements!

I sincerely hope our services can be of use to you!

Best Regards,
Giannis Koukounas, Implementation Consultant at thespelas.com

posts.author: peta (Peta Bolger)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jen_Conturae ,

Welcome to the community!

At upstream, we are proud to offer our expertise as Platinum Partners, monday.com Preferred Partners, and we were recently awarded Professional Services Partner of the Year!

Our company is based in Australia, and we have a dedicated and experienced global staff network that can meet your needs. Our Solutions Engineers and full stack Development Team specialise in integrations and custom requirements, and we are confident in our ability to provide valuable support to your organisation.

To schedule a meeting, you can reach me directly at peta@upstreamtech.io or book a meeting with us through the link provided below. We look forward to discussing your objectives and finding ways to help you achieve your goals.
